element_introduction_order.mastery_context: player learns which formations grant vs. subtract power-up points
player accumulates points to unlock better power-up choices; gray unavailable power-ups are hazards
first purchasable enhancement; effects degrade over time requiring re-engagement
second purchasable enhancement; complements speed upgrades
enemies use lost ships and environmental hazards as cover; increased tactical awareness required
certain formations subtract power-up points; player must learn visual differentiation
upgrades expire, forcing continuous engagement with power-up system

rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: wave-based progression with continuous horizontal scroll; tension maintained through point depletion mechanics and hazard avoidance

difficulty_curve.early_game: introduces basic enemy formations and power-up point system; player learns which formations to target
difficulty_curve.mid_game: introduces penalty formations that subtract points, increased enemy density with tactical positioning using environmental hazards
notable_spikes: introduction of penalty formations requiring visual discrimination
power-up decay mechanic forcing continuous re-engagement
hazard-using alien bandits increasing spatial complexity

notable_level_patterns.description: destroying entire waves of enemies grants credits for weapon/modification purchases; formations are either beneficial or penalizing
accumulated points unlock access to better power-ups; gray unavailable options function as obstacles that kill the player
alien bandits exploit lost ships and environmental obstacles as cover; player must navigate around hazards while engaging threats
